author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ @everyone Very excited to announce the launch of Holosim Season 1: Chapter 2. Coming next Tuesday, March 10. Countdown tracking on https://holosim.staratlas.com/ We’re anticipating a smooth launch. The team has put in incredible work, and this chapter has seen some massive improvements. We appreciate your patience as we put the final polish on the release. And a big thank you to the playtesters who helped us identify some last minute issues that needed to be addressed! A few additional details available here: https://x.com/staratlas/status/2029346545821467120?s=46&t=jQd7Ns0F0BtlP8SMckcU3A
content: @everyone   Very excited to announce the launch of Holosim Season 1: Chapter 2.   Coming next Tuesday, March 10. Countdown tracking on https://holosim.staratlas.com/  We’re anticipating a smooth launch.   The team has put in incredible work, and this chapter has seen some massive improvements. We appreciate your patience as we put the final polish on the release. And a big thank you to the playtesters who helped us identify some last minute issues that needed to be addressed!
